abilities.description: When you apply a ritual mark, adaptive pigment, or nanite pattern that influences the others' emotions, roll +wits. On a strong hit, you may add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} using fear or intimidation. If you roll a 1 on your action die when making a move aided by your visage, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the process is painful or draining; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} [-2].

As above, and you may also add +1 when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a903d120af3b1475]{Battle} as your visage plays in your favor.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} by imposing your presence, you may reroll one challenge die. If you do, you can only choose to be in control on a weak hit.
